title: eragrostis kohorica
intro: Eragrostis kohorica, a type of grass native to the tropical regions of Asia, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis kohorica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
